# model-picker

## Overview

model-picker is a terminal-first model discovery tool for AI builders. Use it to compare models across price, speed, and context, pick the right model for coding agents, and access docs through GitHub, a web docs UI, and llms.txt.

For full documentation, see: https://model-picker.dev/docs
For human-readable README, see: ./README.md

## Install

```bash
# Run instantly — no install required
npx model-picker <command>
bunx model-picker <command>

# Install globally
npm i -g model-picker
bun install -g model-picker

# After install, CLI is available as `model-picker` or `mp`
```

## Data Modes

model-picker has two data modes:

### Live (no API key required for primary path)
- top, get
- Queries OpenRouter frontend API directly, falls back to Firecrawl if available
- Mirrors OpenRouter URL query parameters

### Snapshot (offline, no API key required)
- compare, pick, export, doctor
- Uses local packaged model catalog
- Works without network access

## Commands

### Discovery

```bash
# Live OpenRouter queries
model-picker top --order most-popular --limit 10
model-picker top --categories programming --order top-weekly --zdr
model-picker top --input-modalities text,image --output-modalities image --max-price 0.5
model-picker get openai/gpt-5.4

# Local catalog queries
model-picker compare anthropic/claude-opus-4.6 openai/gpt-5.4
model-picker pick --task agent --agent opencode --limit 5
model-picker pick --agent amp --json
```

### Export

```bash
model-picker export --format markdown --limit 10 --output ./models.md
model-picker export --format json --limit 20
model-picker export --format csv
model-picker export --format ndjson
```

### Setup and Config

```bash
model-picker onboard      # Interactive setup, saves FIRECRAWL_API_KEY to config
model-picker configure     # Re-run configuration
model-picker doctor        # Check config, env vars, and live access status
```

### Development

```bash
bun run dev:web    # Start web dashboard
bun run dev:cli   # Start CLI in watch mode
bun run dev:tui    # Start terminal UI
bun run refresh    # Refresh local model snapshot
bun run build     # Build all packages
bun run test       # Run tests
bun run typecheck  # Type check all packages
```

## Agent-Aware Picks

The `pick` command recommends models tailored to specific coding agents.

```bash
model-picker pick --task agent --agent opencode --limit 5
model-picker pick --task review --agent claude-code --limit 5
model-picker pick --agent amp --json
```

Supported agents:
- amp
- opencode
- claude-code
- codex
- cursor

When --agent is set and --task is omitted, defaults to --task agent.

## OpenRouter Filter Flags

These apply to live commands (top, get):

- --order: most-popular | top-weekly | newest
- --input-modalities: text, image, audio, video
- --output-modalities: text, image, audio, embeddings
- --categories: programming, reasoning, roleplay, image, video
- --max-price: number (per 1M input tokens)
- --zdr: top of DL, rate limited

## Environment Variables

FIRECRAWL_API_KEY    # Optional; enables Firecrawl fallback for live commands
MODEL_PICKER_CONFIG_DIR  # Override config directory

## Config File Location

- macOS/Linux: ~/.config/model-picker/config.json
- Windows: %APPDATA%\model-picker\config.json
- Override: MODEL_PICKER_CONFIG_DIR env var

## Architecture

model-picker is a Bun + Turborepo monorepo:

apps/cli/      # CAC + @clack/prompts command interface
apps/web/     # Astro + Solid web dashboard
apps/tui/     # OpenTUI + Solid terminal interface
packages/catalog/     # Snapshot loading, filtering, sorting, pick
packages/domain/     # Canonical model types and ranking
packages/presenters/  # Cross-surface row/summary formatting
packages/ui-core/     # Shared Solid view-model/state
packages/ingest/      # OpenRouter fetch, speed scraping, consolidation

See ./ARCHITECTURE.md for full system diagram.

## Quick Reference

# Discover models (live)
npx model-picker top --order most-popular --limit 10
# Compare two models (snapshot)
npx model-picker compare anthropic/claude-opus-4.6 openai/gpt-5.4

# Pick best model for an agent (snapshot)
npx model-picker pick --agent opencode --limit 5

# Export results
npx model-picker export --format markdown --limit 10 --output ./models.md

# Check setup
npx model-picker doctor

## Links

Web docs: https://model-picker.dev/docs
GitHub: https://github.com/byhow/model-picker
npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/model-picker
